message:
fix(ci,test): add Homebrew token validation gate before release, fix test assertion pattern for clearer error messages

CI release hardening (.github/workflows/release.yml):
- Add new validate-release-config job as a prerequisite to the build
  job that checks HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN is configured before allowing a
  release to proceed, preventing releases that would silently skip the
  Homebrew tap formula update

Test assertion fix (src/search/query.rs):
- Change two test assertions from .expect_err(msg) to .err().expect(msg)
  -- .expect_err() panics with the Ok value's Debug output if the result
  is Ok, producing confusing error messages and requiring Debug bounds;
  .err().expect() converts to Option first then panics with the provided
  message string, making test failures clearer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,8 +25,23 @@ permissions:
   contents: read
 
 jobs:
+  validate-release-config:
+    name: Validate Release Config
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
+    env:
+      HAS_HOMEBREW_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN != '' }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Require Homebrew token before cutting a release
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${HAS_HOMEBREW_TOKEN}" != "true" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN not configured; refusing to create a release before Homebrew metadata can be updated."
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
   build:
     name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
+    needs: validate-release-config
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     timeout-minutes: 45
     strategy:
